title: Alan Turing: The Enigma
summary: Alan Turing: The Enigma (1983) is a biography of the British mathematician, codebreaker, and early computer scientist, Alan Turing (1912–1954) by Andrew Hodges. The book covers Alan Turing's life and work. The 2014 film The Imitation Game is loosely based on the book, with dramatization.
summary_sentences: Alan Turing: The Enigma (1983) is a biography of the British mathematician, codebreaker, and early computer scientist, Alan Turing (1912–1954) by Andrew Hodges.
The book covers Alan Turing's life and work.
The 2014 film The Imitation Game is loosely based on the book, with dramatization.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Alan Turing: The Enigma (1983) is a biography of the British mathematician , codebreaker , and early computer scientist , Alan Turing (1912–1954) by Andrew Hodges . The book covers Alan Turing's life and work. The 2014 film The Imitation Game is loosely based on the book, with dramatization.
sentences: Alan Turing: The Enigma (1983) is a biography of the British mathematician , codebreaker , and early computer scientist , Alan Turing (1912–1954) by Andrew Hodges .
The book covers Alan Turing's life and work.
The 2014 film The Imitation Game is loosely based on the book, with dramatization.

sections.heading: Editions
sections.text:
The following editions of the book exist:
New editions appeared in 2012, for the centenary of Turing's birth , and 2014, the year the film The Imitation Game was released.
sentences:
The following editions of the book exist:
New editions appeared in 2012, for the centenary of Turing's birth , and 2014, the year the film The Imitation Game was released.

sections.heading: Reviews
sections.text: The book has been widely reviewed by newspapers and magazines including The Guardian , The Independent , Los Angeles Times , Nature , New Statesman , New Yorker , The New York Times , Notices of the American Mathematical Society , Physics Today , Sunday Times , Time Out , Times Literary Supplement , The Wall Street Journal .
sentences: The book has been widely reviewed by newspapers and magazines including The Guardian , The Independent , Los Angeles Times , Nature , New Statesman , New Yorker , The New York Times , Notices of the American Mathematical Society , Physics Today , Sunday Times , Time Out , Times Literary Supplement , The Wall Street Journal .

sections.heading: Influence
sections.text: The book inspired the 2014 film The Imitation Game , directed by Morten Tyldum and starring Benedict Cumberbatch and Keira Knightley .
sentences: The book inspired the 2014 film The Imitation Game , directed by Morten Tyldum and starring Benedict Cumberbatch and Keira Knightley .
